A döntés meghozatalakor az egyik fő szempont az anyag, ami jelen esetben pamut. A pamut párnahuzat nagy népszerűségnek örvend, a változatlan méret- és színállandóságnak köszönhetően. items.raw_desc: Cumi NUK First Choice Night Hippo/Koala 0-6 m, 2 darab:The NUK First Choice Night Hippo/Koala Soother is a silicone orthodontic soother designed for babies from birth to 6 months. Package contains 2 pieces. The pacifier features a soft zone with a soft surface that naturally adapts to the baby's palate. The extra flat shape leaves plenty of room for the tongue and promotes the natural sucking reflex. The extra thin and narrow design of the NUK soother minimises pressure on the jaw and developing teeth.  The orthodontic shape was designed to promote healthy oral development and reduce unwanted stress on the jaw during growth. The pacifier has a light element that allows visibility even in the dark. The disc of the pacifier is shaped with delicate cutouts in the shape of stars and drops to allow air to circulate around the mouth. These holes help prevent irritation of sensitive baby skin. items.raw_desc: Teszter SIXTOL Mechanic Fluid Tester One Fékfolyadék teszter:The SIXTOL MECHANIC FLUID TESTER ONE is a compact and handy tool for quick and easy detection of the water content in brake fluid. Thanks to a pair of metal probes and five coloured LEDs, it allows an immediate assessment of the liquid level from 0% to more than 4% water. At the touch of a button, dip the probes into the tank and the result is immediately displayed on a clear indication. The tester is designed for standard DOT 3, DOT 4 and DOT 5.1 glycol fluids and is ideal for workshop, service and home use. Thanks to the clip on the body of the device, it can be easily attached to your pocket and always be at hand.  The tester is powered by a standard AAA 1.5V battery (not included), so it is ready to use without the need for additional accessories. Vacuum-packed products are healthier and have less access to bacteria. The operation of the vacuum welding machine is very simple. Its basic function is to draw air inside the foil bag and thus vacuum the food products. Such packaging extends the life and shelf life of food. Normally they can be stored for a maximum of 2-3 days. They will keep fresh for 9 days when vacuum packed. Hermetically sealed meat can be stored in the freezer for up to two years. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather and dirt. We recommend replacing a cracked or otherwise damaged cuff as soon as possible. Otherwise, a rusted or dirty towing tube will quickly damage the ramp brake bushings. The rear circular hole of the cuff is fitted with a protrusion on the inside for inserting the cuff into the groove of the ramp brake sleeve (the diameter of the sleeve inside the groove is 60 mm). The front part of the cuff is specially shaped to surround the ball coupling mounted on the towing tube. There are two tabs on the side of the cuff designed to thread the cuff over the head and nut of the rear coupling bolt. The total length of the cuff in the extended working position on the ramp brake is approx. 12.5 cm. Dimensions:  56 mm (diameter 1) x 60 mm (diameter 2) x 125 mm ( length )
